title: Ship AI risk acquisition surfaces and rollout-expansion review content
summary: Records release evidence for the new AI-risk landing page, the risk-focused generic dashboard comparison page, and the rollout-expansion blog that ties release history, incident review, and customer concentration into one decision workflow.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the AI-risk landing page, risk comparison page, homepage discovery links, and rollout-expansion blog route all render from the production build and stay visible in the public route smoke suite.
Confirms the AI-risk acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcement and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the AI-risk landing page, risk comparison entry, rollout-expansion blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
